stimulus: Talavera pottery, ceramics painted with bold blue and yellow designs, can be found across central Mexico. These pieces decorate places such as ______blank markets, and government buildings.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is the best answer. Notice that "cathedrals" is the first item in a list of three things. A comma must be used to separate the first two items in the list, just as a comma is used to separate "markets" and "government buildings."

Choice B is incorrect because the list requires punctuation between items. Choice C is incorrect because a colon cannot be used to separate items within a list. Choice D is incorrect because a dash creates an interruption inconsistent with the rest of the list.
